title: SF Tennis Atlas
description: A source-aware 3D atlas for exploring all 64 official San Francisco public tennis facilities.

prompt.objective: Build a 3D atlas for exploring San Francisco's 64 official public tennis facilities.

mintAssets.brief: Four coherent packs totaling 64 facility-specific public tennis court markers.

experience: Explore all 64 facilities through synchronized 3D map and accessible list views.
Search, filter, select, and inspect court details, source dates, and official reservation links.
prompt.visualDirection: Icy cyan civic cartography, frosted panels, coral signals, and clear public-data typography.

thumbnail.alt: SF Tennis Atlas showing official public tennis facilities across a stylized 3D map of San Francisco

social.title: SF Tennis Atlas
social.description: Explore all 64 official San Francisco public tennis facilities in a source-aware 3D atlas.

image.alt: SF Tennis Atlas showing official public tennis facilities across a stylized 3D map of San Francisco
